items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Hegseth Says U.S. Is Poised to Resume Combat if Talks Fail
items.summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth urged Iran’s leaders to “choose wisely” and threatened more attacks, even as the war’s economic toll puts pressure on President Trump.
